violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, soup was placed hot and covered in the walk-in freezer in containers greater than four inches deep. Soup was portioned into smaller containers to finish cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The 2 door reach-in #1 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen dishwasher. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink in the kitchen. A sink in the kitchen with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and sanitizing equipment and utensils. Establishment is to send proof of 3-bay sink installation to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the bar coolers and hood system have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The floor behind the grill line and along the basement floor has an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Low boy door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by drying rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (leafy greens, dressings) in the reach in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the basement, walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The knives were stored on an unclean surface (behind 3 bay sink) between uses. Utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Low boy door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back prep area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The hood/ventilation have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
